title: AI Product Strategist
description: Lead the design and development of AI-driven products by translating real-world problems into scalable AI solutions and driving product strategy from concept to deployment.
role_summary: Own the vision, strategy, and roadmap for AI products and collaborate with engineering teams to deliver impactful solutions.
key_responsibilities: Identify user problems and define AI product opportunities
Create product roadmaps and define MVP scope
Collaborate with engineering teams to translate requirements into solutions
Define success metrics and evaluate product outcomes
Drive product strategy discussions with stakeholders

test_definition.description: Evaluation of product thinking, problem framing, and AI product strategy

questions_json.question_text: What is the first step in designing an AI product?
Which metric is most useful for validating an MVP in an AI product?
Describe an AI product idea you would take from concept to deployment and explain the target user problem.
What is the main purpose of a product roadmap?
options: To define long-term vision and priorities
questions_json.correct_answer: To define long-term vision and priorities

questions_json.question_text: How would you prioritize features for an AI product with limited engineering bandwidth?
Who is primarily responsible for aligning product goals with user needs and business impact?

title: AI Innovation Engineer
description: Develop and prototype AI solutions to solve real-world problems using modern machine learning and AI frameworks.
role_summary: Build AI prototypes and implement real-world AI use cases using modern frameworks and applied engineering practices.
key_responsibilities: Develop AI models and prototypes
Experiment with machine learning frameworks
Build AI-driven applications
Optimize model performance
Collaborate with product and data teams

test_definition.description: Evaluation of machine learning fundamentals and real-world AI application thinking

questions_json.question_text: Which framework is commonly used for deep learning model development?
Which language is most commonly used for AI and ML prototyping?
Describe a real-world AI use case you would prototype during the hackathon.
Which of the following is a supervised learning task?
Which library is widely used for transformer-based models?
How would you evaluate the quality of an AI prototype before presenting it?
What is overfitting in machine learning?
options: The model performs well on training data but poorly on unseen data
The dataset is too small to store
The model has too few parameters
questions_json.correct_answer: The model performs well on training data but poorly on unseen data

questions_json.question_text: Explain how you would improve an underperforming machine learning model.

title: Cognitive AI Innovation Fellow
description: Explore advanced AI concepts and experimentation, working on innovative cognitive AI technologies such as LLMs, agents, and multimodal systems.
role_summary: Experiment with emerging AI models and cognitive systems, building proof-of-concepts around LLMs, multimodal systems, and AI agents.
key_responsibilities: Experiment with emerging AI models and architectures
Explore LLM-based solutions and agentic AI frameworks
Conduct research on new AI capabilities and methods
Build proof-of-concept AI innovations
Document and present AI experimentation outcomes

test_definition.description: Evaluation of advanced AI understanding, experimentation, and LLM concepts

questions_json.question_text: What does LLM stand for?
Which framework is commonly used for transformer-based NLP models?
Describe one cognitive AI concept or emerging AI capability you would like to explore during the hackathon.
Which of the following best describes multimodal AI?
options: AI systems that work with multiple data types such as text and images
questions_json.correct_answer: AI systems that work with multiple data types such as text and images

questions_json.question_text: What is one key benefit of AI agents?
options: They can autonomously perform multi-step tasks
They eliminate the need for prompts
questions_json.correct_answer: They can autonomously perform multi-step tasks

questions_json.question_text: How would you validate whether an experimental AI idea is worth taking to prototype?
Which skill is most important for this role?
Explain how you would compare two LLM-based approaches for the same use case.

title: AI Transformation Engineer
description: Apply AI to business processes, helping organizations automate workflows, improve decision-making, and implement AI-driven transformation initiatives.
role_summary: Work at the intersection of business workflows and AI by identifying automation opportunities and enabling AI-led transformation.
key_responsibilities: Identify business workflows that can be optimized using AI
Design automation frameworks using AI technologies
Integrate AI capabilities into existing enterprise systems
Analyze operational data to improve processes
Collaborate with business stakeholders to implement solutions

test_definition.description: Evaluation of business process analysis and AI transformation thinking

questions_json.question_text: What is the first step in applying AI to a business workflow?
options: Understand the current process and pain points
questions_json.correct_answer: Understand the current process and pain points

questions_json.question_text: Which outcome best reflects successful AI transformation?
options: Reduced manual effort and improved process efficiency
questions_json.correct_answer: Reduced manual effort and improved process efficiency

questions_json.question_text: Describe a business problem that could be solved using AI-driven automation.
Why is stakeholder alignment important in transformation projects?
options: To ensure solution adoption and clarity of requirements
questions_json.correct_answer: To ensure solution adoption and clarity of requirements

questions_json.question_text: Which tool type is often used in workflow automation?
How would you measure the success of an AI-based business process improvement project?
Which of the following is a strong skill for this role?
Explain how you would prioritize multiple candidate workflows for AI transformation.

title: Computer Vision Pioneer
description: Build AI systems that analyze and interpret visual data including images and videos for real-world vision AI applications.
role_summary: Develop computer vision solutions for tasks such as detection, classification, and visual analytics using image and video data.
key_responsibilities: Train computer vision models
Work with image and video datasets
Develop detection and classification systems
Evaluate model accuracy and performance
Prototype vision AI solutions

test_definition.description: Evaluation of computer vision fundamentals and practical problem-solving

questions_json.question_text: Which library is commonly used for image processing in Python?
Which task is an example of computer vision?
Describe a computer vision problem you would like to solve during the hackathon.
What does YOLO primarily help with?
Which metric is commonly used for classification performance?
How would you improve a computer vision model that performs poorly on low-light images?
Which framework is commonly used for deep learning-based vision models?
Explain how dataset quality impacts the performance of a vision model.

title: Data Intelligence Strategist
description: Drive data-driven insights and manage data lifecycle processes including data creation, curation, and annotation for AI systems, with a business-oriented approach.
role_summary: Support AI solutions through structured data creation, curation, annotation, and business insight generation.
key_responsibilities: Design data collection and preparation strategies
Manage data annotation and curation workflows
Generate business insights from datasets
Support AI model development with high-quality data
Ensure data quality standards and consistency
certifications_or_qualifications: MBA / Business Analytics / BBA / Data Analytics Certification

test_definition.description: Evaluation of data lifecycle understanding, data curation, annotation, and business insight thinking

questions_json.question_text: Which of the following is part of the data lifecycle?
Why is data annotation important for AI systems?
options: It helps create labeled data for training models
questions_json.correct_answer: It helps create labeled data for training models

questions_json.question_text: Describe how well-curated data can improve the success of an AI solution.
Which tool is commonly used for business dashboards and reporting?
Which activity best represents data curation?
options: Cleaning and organizing data for use
questions_json.correct_answer: Cleaning and organizing data for use

questions_json.question_text: What business risks can arise from poor quality or poorly annotated data?
Which skill is most relevant for a Data Intelligence Strategist?
options: Ability to derive insights from data
questions_json.correct_answer: Ability to derive insights from data

questions_json.question_text: How would you prioritize data annotation efforts if time and resources were limited?

title: AI Systems Trailblazer
description: Design scalable infrastructure for deploying and operating AI systems in production-like environments.
role_summary: Build scalable AI deployment pipelines, backend integrations, and system architectures for AI-powered products.
key_responsibilities: Develop AI deployment pipelines
Integrate APIs and backend services
Optimize model serving performance
Monitor system reliability and scalability
Build production-ready AI infrastructure components

test_definition.description: Evaluation of backend, deployment, and AI infrastructure fundamentals

questions_json.question_text: What is Docker primarily used for?
Why are APIs important in AI systems?
options: They allow models and services to communicate with applications
They are only used for presentation slides
questions_json.correct_answer: They allow models and services to communicate with applications

questions_json.question_text: Describe how you would deploy an AI model so that another application can consume it.
Which tool is commonly used to serve Python APIs quickly?
What is a key goal of scalability in AI systems?
How would you monitor the reliability of an AI inference service?
Which of the following is a cloud platform commonly used for deployment?
Explain how containerization helps make AI systems easier to deploy and maintain.

title: Intelligent Solutions Builder
description: Build end-to-end AI applications by integrating machine learning models into practical, user-facing software systems.
role_summary: Develop intelligent applications and working prototypes by combining AI models, APIs, and product-facing interfaces.
key_responsibilities: Build AI-powered applications and prototypes
Integrate ML models into software systems
Develop APIs and user-facing workflows
Prototype intelligent product experiences
Deploy and demonstrate end-to-end AI solutions

test_definition.description: Evaluation of end-to-end AI application development and integration thinking

questions_json.question_text: What is the purpose of an API in an AI-powered application?
options: To connect application components and services
questions_json.correct_answer: To connect application components and services

questions_json.question_text: Which tool is commonly used to create quick AI web app demos?
Describe an AI-powered application you would build during the hackathon and explain the user value.
Which of the following best describes an end-to-end AI solution?
options: A solution that connects data, model, application, and user experience
A standalone dataset with no usage
A slide deck with no prototype
questions_json.correct_answer: A solution that connects data, model, application, and user experience

questions_json.question_text: Which language is commonly used for backend AI application development?
How would you structure an MVP for an intelligent application with limited time?
Which skill is most important for this role?
options: Ability to integrate AI into usable applications
questions_json.correct_answer: Ability to integrate AI into usable applications

questions_json.question_text: Explain how you would validate that your AI application is usable, reliable, and valuable to end users.
